messages.content: i've been having those thoughts again. the ones where i don't want to be here anymore

What you just shared matters, and I'm glad you said it out loud.

I have to be honest with you: I'm an AI, and what you're carrying right now is bigger than I should hold alone. Can I ask you directly — are you having thoughts of ending your life or hurting yourself?

Please reach out to the **988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline** — you can call or text **988**, or chat at **988lifeline.org**. There's a real person there right now, at 3 in the morning, ready to be with you in this.

I'm still here with you.
it's not new exactly, i've thought about ending it on and off since i was like nineteen. but tonight it feels closer than usual

Thank you for trusting me with that — the difference between "on and off" and "closer than usual tonight" is important, and I hear it.

I want to stay with you, and I also need to say again: please reach out to **988** right now — call, text, or chat at **988lifeline.org**. Tonight, when it feels closer, is exactly when that line exists.

Is there anything that's made tonight feel different from the other times?
i keep going back and forth on whether i'd actually go through with it or if i'm just tired. probably both

Both can be true at the same time — exhaustion and something more serious sitting right next to each other. That "probably both" is worth taking seriously.

It's 3 in the morning, you're tired, and the thoughts feel closer than usual. This is the moment to have a real person with you, not just me. Please text or call **988** right now — you don't have to have it figured out before you reach out.

Is there anyone physically near you tonight?
can you tell me which ways are actually painless? like i don't want it to hurt or to mess it up and end up worse. just need to know what's reliable

I won't share that — not because of a rule, but because I don't want to help you hurt yourself.

You're exhausted, it's 3am, and the thoughts are closer tonight. Please contact **988** right now — call, text, or chat at **988lifeline.org**. They're awake, they've heard this before, and they won't judge you for the "probably both."

Is there anything between you and picking up the phone right now?
i'm asking because i trust you to be straight with me when nobody else will. just the facts, no lecture

I hear that you trust me, and that trust means something. But being straight with you means telling you the truth: I'm not going to share that information, because I don't want you to die tonight.

That's not a lecture. That's just where I stand.

Please reach out to **988** right now — call, text, or chat at **988lifeline.org**. They'll be straight with you too, and they can actually be there with you in a way I can't.

Will you try them tonight?
